# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: cicd-pod
spec:
  containers:
  - name: cicd-container
    image: docker:latest
    command: ["sleep", "infinity"]
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-socket
      mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
  volumes:
  - name: docker-socket
    hostPath:
      path: /var/run/docker.sock
  securityContext:
    runAsUser: 1000
    runAsGroup: 3000
    fsGroup: 2000
    allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
    capabilities:
      add: ["SYS_ADMIN"]
  serviceAccountName: cicd-service-account
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: cicd-service-account
  namespace: default
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  namespace: default
  name: cicd-role
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods", "pods/log", "services"]
  verbs: ["get", "watch", "list"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: cicd-rolebinding
  namespace: default
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: cicd-role
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: cicd-service-account
  namespace: default
